/usr/bin/gcc -Wall -g -D_POSIX_C_SOURCE=200809L -D_XOPEN_SOURCE=700 -D_GNU_SOURCE -DPCL_PLATFORM_TI_AM625=1 -DPCL_PRODUCT_H200_100P=1 -DPDL_SATELLITE_SUPPORT=1 -DPDL_BMC_SUPPORT=1 -DPDL_MCU_SUPPORT=1 -DPDL_WATCHDOG_SUPPORT=1 -DACL_MAX_DEVICES=64 -DH200_AM625=1 CMakeFiles/ccm_collector.dir/exe_src.c.o -o ccm_collector  -Wl,-rpath,/home/wanguo/EMS/products/ccm/apps/ccm_collector/build/acl:/home/wanguo/EMS/products/ccm/apps/ccm_collector/build/pdl:/home/wanguo/EMS/products/ccm/apps/ccm_collector/build/pcl:/home/wanguo/EMS/products/ccm/apps/ccm_collector/build/hal:/home/wanguo/EMS/products/ccm/apps/ccm_collector/build/osal main/libmain.a h200_am625/libh200_am625.a acl/libacl.so pdl/libpdl.so pcl/libpcl.so hal/libhal.so libccm/liblibccm.a osal/libosal.so -lpthread -lrt -lm
